title: UniBond Sealant Remover and Smoother Tool, Easy-to-Use Sealant Finishing Tool, 2-in-1 Plastic Sealant Tool for Smoothing, Silicone Remover Tool, Black
features: Easy-to-use – It doesn't get much simpler than this silicone sealant tool, get's the job of removing or smoothing sealant done easily and quickly with no fuss
Long-lasting – At UniBond we take pride in producing the most durable, hard-wearing products - this handy sealant remover tool is tough and built to last
No damage – This UniBond sealant remover is designed to allow you to remove existing sealant easily without damaging tiles or other surfaces - no unsightly scratches
100% smooth – The sealant smoother part of this tool has 2 smoothing profiles to produce ideal smooth sealant joints - for DIY jobs you can really be proud of
Package contents – 1x UniBond Sealant Remover and Smoother Tool, durable, easy-to-use 2-in1 sealant finishing tool for smoothing and removing sealant, black
description: From the manufacturer About Unibond In the UK, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products - Construction Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job for both inside and outside the house. UniBond Sealant Remover & Smoother Removing and smoothing sealant made easy The Sealant Remover and Smoother Tool is designed with simplicity, practicality and durability in mind. This handy 2-in-1 tool allows you to remove sealant quickly and easily without damaging the surrounding surfaces, and the two smoothing profiles allow you to put the ideal finish to any sealing job. Once you try this practical tool, you'll wonder how you completed any sealant-removal or smoothing jobs without it! Simple and easy to use Long lasting and durable Designed not to damage surfaces 2 smoothing profiles for more control Format: 1 x device How to remove sealant residue Step 1: Wear protective gloves and make sure the area is well-ventilated. Step 2: For silicone sealant residue, add UniBond Silicone Sealant Remover Tube for clean results. Step 3: Wait a few hours to allow remover/spirit to permeate. Step 4: Use the Smoother & Remover tool to remove the bulk of the residue, then try pliers or a scouring pad for the rest. Step 5: When cleaning surface, use warm water mixed with bleach. Make sure the surface is dry before applying new sealant. Simple removal of old sealant every time! It doesn't get much simpler than this silicone sealant removal and smoothing tool! With the two different ends, the job of removing or smoothing sealant is done easily and quickly with no fuss. UniBond Sealant Remover & Smoother Unibond Sealant Finishing Tool Unibond Grout Reviver Pen UniBond Renew 2.0 UniBond Silicone Sealant Remover Tube Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 10,532 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,348 4.0 out of 5 stars 20,330 4.3 out of 5 stars 4,225 4.2 out of 5 stars 2,787 Price — no data £2.47 £ 2 . 47 £4.94 £ 4 . 94 £8.00 £ 8 . 00 £7.00 £ 7 . 00 Format 1 Device 1 x Device 1 x 7ml Pen 1 x 80ml Tube 1 x 80ml Tube Colour Black Red White White Clear Application For removing existing sealant from a variety of surfaces, as well as smoothing during application For smoothing sealant for the perfect finish. Suitable for use with all types of sealant Ideal for use in the bathroom or kitchen and dries within 60 minutes For easily renewing bath, sink and kitchen sealant For quickly removing sealant indoors & outdoors Characteristics With 2-in-1 functionality. Does not damage surfaces or tiles Reduces waste and provides a professional-looking finish Kitchen and bathroom grout cleaner to refresh discoloured/faded grout joints. Easy to apply, with triple mould protection An innovative formula that refreshes old silicone. Simply apply on top of existing sealant A high strength silicone remover. Fast & effective, easy to use
